# SnowballPay

> SnowballPay is a personal debt elimination planner that uses the proven Debt Snowball and Debt Avalanche strategies to help users pay off debt faster, save on interest, and build lasting financial freedom.

SnowballPay helps individuals track every debt balance, choose a payoff strategy, follow a personalized plan, and visualize their path to becoming debt-free. It is free to start and requires no credit card.

## What Is SnowballPay?

SnowballPay is a web application that automates and visualizes two proven debt payoff methods:

- **Debt Snowball**: Pay debts from smallest balance to largest. Quick wins build momentum and motivation.
- **Debt Avalanche**: Pay debts from highest interest rate to lowest. Minimizes total interest paid over time.

Users enter their debts (balance, interest rate, minimum payment), choose a strategy, and get an interactive payoff timeline showing exactly when each debt will be gone and how much interest they will save.

## Core Features

- Debt Snowball and Avalanche payoff plans with automatic ordering
- Interactive payoff timeline chart (exact debt-free date)
- Per-debt progress bars and payment tracking
- Interest savings comparison between strategies
- Payment streak and milestone tracking
- Free debt payoff calculator (no account required)
- AI-powered recommendations for optimizing payoff strategy
- Support for credit cards, car loans, student loans, medical debt, and any installment debt

## Pages

- [Home](https://getsnowballpay.com): Product overview, features, pricing, testimonials, and FAQ.
- [Learn: Snowball vs Avalanche](https://getsnowballpay.com/learn): Comprehensive educational comparison of both debt payoff strategies — how each works, psychological vs mathematical benefits, side-by-side comparison table, and a decision guide.
- [Free Debt Payoff Calculator](https://getsnowballpay.com/calculator): No-login calculator. Enter debt balances, interest rates, and minimum payments to see your exact debt-free date and total interest saved — instantly.
- [Privacy Policy](https://getsnowballpay.com/privacy): How SnowballPay collects, uses, and protects user financial data.
- [Terms of Service](https://getsnowballpay.com/terms): Usage terms for the platform.

## Debt Snowball Method — Summary

1. List all debts from smallest balance to largest (ignore interest rates).
2. Pay the minimum on all debts except the smallest.
3. Direct all extra money at the smallest debt until it is paid off.
4. Roll that freed-up payment into the next smallest debt.
5. Repeat — the payment "snowballs" and grows with each victory.

**Best for**: People who need visible progress and psychological wins to stay motivated.

## Debt Avalanche Method — Summary

1. List all debts from highest interest rate to lowest.
2. Pay the minimum on all debts except the highest-rate debt.
3. Direct all extra money at the highest-rate debt until it is paid off.
4. Cascade those savings to the next highest-rate debt.
5. Repeat — total interest paid is minimized.

**Best for**: Mathematically-minded people focused on minimizing total cost.

## Pricing

- **Free plan**: Track up to 5 debts, Snowball strategy, basic progress tracking.
- **Pro plan**: Unlimited debts, Avalanche strategy, AI recommendations, document import, advanced payoff reports.

## Target Audience

Adults with consumer debt — credit cards, car loans, student loans, medical bills, personal loans — who want a structured, motivating plan to pay it off faster than making only minimum payments.

## Technology

Built with Next.js 14 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Prisma, and PostgreSQL (Neon). Authentication via Auth0.
